ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "employee_eid" INTEGER /* Employee's enterprise ID */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Employee's full name */,
  "email" TEXT /* Employee's email address */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Employee's age */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the employee belongs to */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role the employee has */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manager of the employee */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Employee's job title */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Employee's hire date */,
  "address" TEXT /* Employee's address */,
  "city" TEXT /* Employee's city */,
  "state" TEXT /* Employee's state */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Employee's zip code */,
  "country" TEXT /* Employee's country */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Employee's phone number */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Employee's emergency contact name */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Employee's emergency contact phone number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager responsible for the department */,
  "department_description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_level" TEXT /* Level of the role (e.g., junior, senior) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salaries" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "amount" REAL /* Salary amount */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the salary */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the salary */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the salary */,
  "salary_type" TEXT /* Type of salary (e.g., annual, hourly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salaries_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bonuses" (
  "bonus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bonus record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "amount" REAL /* Bonus amount */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the bonus */,
  "bonus_date" TEXT /* Date the bonus was awarded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bonus */,
  "bonus_type" TEXT /* Type of bonus (e.g., performance, referral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bonus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bonuses_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the evaluation */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score received in the evaluation */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided in the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_type" TEXT /* Type of evaluation (e.g., quarterly, annual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_evaluations_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leave_records" (
  "leave_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leave record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the leave */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the leave */,
  "leave_type" TEXT /* Type of leave (e.g., annual, sick) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the leave (e.g., approved, pending) */,
  "leave_balance" REAL /* Remaining leave balance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leave_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leave_records_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_tracking" (
  "time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time tracking record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the time tracking entry */,
  "hours_worked" REAL /* Number of hours worked */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the task */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_tracking_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_tracking_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_tracking_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "task_name" TEXT /* Name of the task */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the task */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the task */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the task (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user access record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "module" TEXT /* Module or feature accessed */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the access was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integration" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration record */,
  "system_name" TEXT /* Name of the external system */,
  "connection_type" TEXT /* Type of connection (e.g., API, direct database link) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the integration (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_sync_date" TEXT /* Date when the last synchronization occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_protection" (
  "protection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data protection record */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data protected (e.g., employee personal data, salary information) */,
  "compliance_level" TEXT /* Level of compliance with data protection regulations */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the last audit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protection_id")
)
